NAME: gnomAD v4 — Massive multi-ancestry expansion
DESCRIPTION: gnomAD v4 dramatically expanded to 807,098 exomes and 76,215 genomes, with substantially improved ancestral diversity. v4 included >30 genetic ancestry groups, enabling more precise population-specific allele frequency estimates. New constraint metrics across diverse ancestries and improved structural variant calls made this the most comprehensive human variation resource ever created.
